title: The Bliss SMP
description: This Mod is inspired by Bliss SMP
body:
Wealth Gem - Gives an emrald when clicked,When in hand gives hero of the village(In offhand hold 1st slot)

Speed Gem - Gives speed in hand(In offhand hold 1st slot),When entity is hit by it they get slowness

Puff Gem - Gives Jump Boost(In offhand hold 1st slot) and removes Fall Damage

Life Gem - Gives Regeneration(In offhand hold 1st slot) and immune to Whiter

Fire Gem - Gives Fire Resistance(In offhand hold 1st slot) and when right clicked summons fireballl

Flux Gem - Immune to slowness,hunger and weakness

Gem Ore - Found between y -128 and 0

Gems - Drop of Gem Ore

Gem Crafter - Crafted from 9 Gems, Break a block to pick a gem
